description_long: This object is a rectangular, black stereo speaker with a minimalist design, featuring two prominent circular drivers on its front face. The upper driver is smaller, likely a tweeter, while the lower, larger driver serves as the woofer, both set into a smooth, matte-finished baffle. The front face displays the 'logitech' logo in white, centered below the woofer. The sides and rear of the speaker are plain, with no visible ports, controls, or decorative elements, emphasizing a clean, monolithic appearance. The enclosure appears to be constructed from dense plastic or MDF, typical for modern speaker cabinets, with a hard, smooth surface. This type of speaker would commonly be found in urban environments such as home studios, living rooms, or entertainment spaces.
description: A black, rectangular stereo speaker with two circular drivers and a 'logitech' logo on the front, featuring a smooth, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two circular speaker drivers and the 'logitech' logo beneath them.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, featureless black surface with slight curvature.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a flat, unadorned black panel with no visible ports or features.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, with a smooth, featureless black surface.
attribute_brand_logo: A white 'logitech' logo centered on the lower front face, in simple sans-serif text.
